misc: Bags Miura irons and is rumoured to sleep with them.
biography: Miso, a formidable presence hailing from Hirsala Golf, brings a unique blend of passion and precision to the greens. Known for his meticulous approach to the game, Miso is a dedicated golfer who has appeared in this competition on 10 separate occasions.

Miso's dedication extends beyond the course; rumour has it that he cherishes his Miura irons to an almost obsessive degree, with whispers even suggesting that he sleeps with them to maintain their perfect condition. While this might seem eccentric to some, it speaks volumes about Miso's commitment to his craft.

With one Hector Trophée victory under his belt, Miso has proven his capability to perform under pressure. Though he has yet to claim the Victor Trophy for individual excellence, his consistent performance and strategic gameplay make him a respected competitor in every tournament he enters.
Although Miso is not scheduled to participate in Hector Trophée 2026, his continued activity in Hector events suggests that we may very well see him grace the fairways in future competitions.
